idea.title: Jumping Jacks (Saltos de Tijera)
idea.hook: ¿Qué pasa si haces 50 Jumping Jacks cada tarde durante 15 días?

scenes.image_prompt: 3D render of a cartoon-style human skeleton mid-air, arms and legs spread wide in a star shape with motion lines showing fast movement, inside a transparent glass-like human body silhouette, full body visible, wide cartoonish eyes, friendly smile, bones are cream/ivory colored, outer body is clear glossy translucent gel-like skin, bright afternoon sun in the background, studio lighting, photorealistic 3D render
scenes.narration: ¿Qué pasa si haces 50 Jumping Jacks cada tarde durante 15 días? Es la ráfaga de energía que tu cuerpo necesita a mitad del día.

scenes.image_prompt: 3D render of a cartoon-style human skeleton with a big red heart icon beating fast inside the chest and floating yellow happy faces around, inside a transparent glass-like human body silhouette, skeleton looking electric with sparks around, wide cartoonish eyes, bones are cream/ivory colored, outer body is clear glossy translucent gel-like skin, neutral gray background, studio lighting, photorealistic 3D render
scenes.narration: Desde el primer día, tu ritmo cardíaco se elevará al instante. Sentirás un subidón de endorfinas que mejorará tu humor y te dará energía pura en solo 60 segundos.

scenes.image_prompt: 3D render of a cartoon-style human skeleton with glowing green lines representing the lymphatic system flowing upwards, inside a transparent glass-like human body silhouette, skeleton stepping on a scale showing a minus sign, wide cartoonish eyes, bones are cream/ivory colored, outer body is clear glossy translucent gel-like skin, neutral gray background, studio lighting, photorealistic 3D render
scenes.narration: Al llegar al día 15, tu sistema linfático se activará. Saltar ayuda a eliminar toxinas estancadas. El resultado será menos retención de líquidos y te sentirás mucho menos hinchado.

scenes.image_prompt: 3D render of a cartoon-style human skeleton landing softly on a fluffy cloud on its toes, inside a transparent glass-like human body silhouette, wide cartoonish eyes, holding a speech bubble asking '¿Qué piensas?', bones are cream/ivory colored, outer body is clear glossy translucent gel-like skin, neutral gray background, studio lighting, photorealistic 3D render
scenes.narration: Advertencia: Aterriza siempre suavemente sobre la punta de los pies, nunca con el talón. ¿Tú ya saltas o todavía crees que el cardio es aburrido? ¡Cuéntame qué piensas!
